name: Russia
q1_economic: World's 11th largest economy. Oil/gas revenues fund state. Ukraine war costs ~$300B/year. Hormuz closure adds $150M/day.
q2_psychological: Civilisational pride. Restoration of great power status after 1991 humiliation.
q3_benefits_no: Earns $150M/day from Hormuz closure. Oil price: $44 to $100. Ukraine war funded.
q8_collapse_trigger: Ukraine war resolution — removes financial need for Hormuz windfall
q9_india_equivalent: United States — global power status comparator

verified_actions.action: Co-vetoed UN SC resolution on Hormuz with China
Russian oil price rose from $44 to $100 on Hormuz closure
Russia earns $150M/day extra from elevated oil prices
